item.title: Harness engineering: leveraging Codex in an agent-first world
item.description: By Ryan Lopopolo, Member of the Technical Staff

item.title: Bringing ChatGPT to GenAI.mil
item.description: OpenAI for Government announces the deployment of a custom ChatGPT on GenAI.mil, bringing secure, safety-forward AI to U.S. defense teams.

item.title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control.
